spec.user: In the Rust crate at {project_root}, fix the booking overlap logic in src/lib.rs so the tests pass. Preserve the public API and keep the crate dependency-free.

steps.replace:
pub fn first_conflict(existing: &[Booking], candidate: Booking) -> Option<Booking> {
    existing
        .iter()
        .copied()
        .filter(|slot| slot.overlaps(&candidate))
        .min_by_key(|slot| slot.start)
}

spec.final: FINAL: Updated overlap checks to use half-open interval semantics and fixed conflict selection to return the earliest conflicting booking by start time; all tests now pass.
